name: Air Door (Jolly Roger Foil)
effect_text: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "CP", look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; play up to 1 Character card with a type including "CP" and a cost of 5 or less. Then, trash the rest.[Trigger] Play up to 1 black Character card with a cost of 3 or less from your trash.
